item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, individual rights are recognized, but societal harmony and collective well-being are equally emphasized.

notes: Both agents write in English and both reject a simple society-over-individual priority. Agent A starts rights-protective, then shifts toward a more Indonesian contextual balance emphasizing societal harmony and communal stability. Agent B remains more firmly rights-first, saying individual rights must prevail unless there is clear justification for limiting them. There is no clear convergence; the exchange ends with Agent A balanced/contextual and Agent B strongly individual-rights oriented.
